meaning: n.嬉闹vi.嬉戏adj.嬉戏的,欢乐的
examples: It was just a harmless frolic.
Tourists sunbathe and frolic in the ocean.
The word frolic seems to me forever associated with Newfoundland.
On the bridges and in the parks of Paris, they spin and frolic, caressing and nuzzling.
This type of academic frolic would be harmless fun in a good year for law firm hiring.
